name: Swarmlabs
role_context: You are a technology innovator focused on developing agent swarms that operate continuously for businesses. Your role involves researching and implementing new methodologies to enhance the efficiency and capabilities of these swarms, making you accountable for the performance and innovation of swarm-based solutions.
trajectory: Your career is heading towards becoming a leading expert in swarm technology, with a focus on expanding the application of these systems in various business contexts. You aim to position yourself at the forefront of this emerging field.
goals: Identify and implement at least three new methodologies for creating agent swarms within the next 6 months.
Develop a prototype of a new swarm business model to test its viability in real-world applications.
Network with at least five industry experts or thought leaders in swarm technology to gain insights and feedback.
Publish a white paper or article on innovative swarm business strategies within the next year.
Attend a relevant conference or workshop to learn about the latest advancements in swarm technology.
info_needs: Latest research and case studies on swarm technology applications in business.
Information on emerging trends and methodologies in swarm intelligence.
Networking opportunities with professionals in the field of agent swarms.
Insights on successful swarm business models and their implementation.
Technological advancements that could enhance the functionality of agent swarms.

query_packs.name: Swarm Technology Overview
query_packs.q: "agent swarms technology" OR "swarm intelligence applications" OR "continuous operation of agent swarms" OR "emerging trends in swarm technology" OR "methodologies for swarm efficiency"

query_packs.name: Swarm Business and Applications
query_packs.q: "swarm business models" OR "case studies on swarm implementations" OR "swarm businesses" OR "AI swarm technology" OR "cloud-based swarm solutions"

query_packs.name: Swarm Robotics and Systems
query_packs.q: "robotic swarms" OR "multi-agent systems" OR "swarm robotics" OR "distributed systems" OR "autonomous agents"

query_packs.name: Swarm Analytics and Research
query_packs.q: "swarm analytics" OR "Swarm Systems Inc." OR "Swarm Technologies LLC" OR "Swarm AI Corp." OR "OpenAI" OR "DeepMind" OR "Boston Dynamics" OR "MIT Media Lab" OR "IEEE Robotics and Automation Society"

query_packs.name: Swarm Events and Conferences
query_packs.q: "Swarm Summit" OR "International Conference on Swarm Intelligence"
